{{Infobox artifact
| name = Twin Dragon Rejuvenation Pill
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Dragon Rejuvenation Pill]] is a half-refined and half-[[Forged]] pill made to help [[Archlords]] regenerate and improve [[madra]] quality.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
